# LIO-324: API - Unificado del listado de ventas y compras - Detalles en la búsqueda por texto y filtrado del estado del pedido

| Campo | Valor |
|-------|-------|
| Estado | Finalizada (Listo) |
| Tipo | Error |
| Prioridad | Medium |
| Asignado | Ezequiel manzano |
| Reportado por | Guillermo Avila |
| Creado | 2025-04-15 11:16 |
| Actualizado | 2025-04-21 15:13 |
| Etiquetas | ninguna |
| Jira | [LIO-324](https://bluinc.atlassian.net/browse/LIO-324) |

## Descripción

```
GET {APIv4_URL}/purchases
```



- Al buscar por texto (nombre del producto, cliente, marca, número de compra) me aparece el siguiente error:



```
curl "https://gamma.api4.libreopcion.com/v4/purchases?rol=vendedor&page=1&limit=10&estado=todas&busqueda=Mouse+Gamer+Razer+Basilisk+V3+Wired+Ergonomic+" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:137.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/137.0" -H "Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*" -H "Accept-Language: es-MX" -H "Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br, zstd" -H "Referer: https://gamma.libreopcion.com/venta/mis-ventas?page=1&limit=10&estado=todas&busqueda=Mouse^%^20Gamer^%^20Razer^%^20Basilisk^%^20V3^%^20Wired^%^20Ergonomic^%^20" -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Q1zoI8xymrkRc-mOOkudJdV491gh5opZdXGpmd8iv2g" -H "Origin: https://gamma.libreopcion.com" -H "Connection: keep-alive" -H "Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty" -H "Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors" -H "Sec-Fetch-Site: same-site" -H "Priority: u=0"
```

```
Object { status: 500, title: `SQLSTATE[HY000]: General error: 20018 The multi-part identifier "marcas.nombre" could not be bound. [20018] (severity 16) [SELECT \n COUNT(PC.id) AS total\n FROM [LO].[dbo].[pedidosDetalle] PD\n LEFT JOIN [CS].[dbo].[productos] P ON PD.productoID = P.id\n LEFT JOIN [LO].[dbo].[usuarios] U ON P.id_usuario = U.id\n LEFT JOIN [LO].[dbo].[vendedores] V ON P.vendedorID = V.id\n LEFT JOIN [LO].[dbo].[pedidosCabeceraVendedor] PCV ON PD.pedidoCa…ES.dbo.MS_VENTAS_REMITOS AS MVR ON MVR.REMITO_FP = AT.cnumalb AND MVR.SUCURSAL_REMITO = AT.CNUMSUC\n WHERE PC.confirmado = 1 AND PC.fechaCreacion >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) AND [PCV].[vendedorID] = :userId AND ([P].titulo LIKE '%Mouse Gamer Razer Basilisk V3 Wired Ergonomic%' OR [U].nombre LIKE '%Mouse Gamer Razer Basilisk V3 Wired Ergonomic%' OR [V].nombre LIKE '%Mouse Gamer Razer Basilisk V3 Wired Ergonomic%' OR [marcas].nombre LIKE '%Mouse Gamer Razer Basilisk V3 Wired Ergonomic%' ) )`, file: "/var/www/app/vendor/laravel/framework/src/Illuminate/Database/Connection.php", … }
```

[attachment]


- Al filtrar por `orderStatus=recibimos_tu_pedido` solo aparece un resultado, pero al visualizar todas las compras se muestran más.



```
curl "https://gamma.api4.libreopcion.com/v4/purchases?rol=comprador&page=1&limit=10&orderStatus=recibimos_tu_pedido" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:137.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/137.0" -H "Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*" -H "Accept-Language: es-MX" -H "Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br, zstd" -H "Referer: https://gamma.libreopcion.com/compra/mis-compras?page=1&limit=10&orderStatus=recibimos_tu_pedido" -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..IRwANDGX0tns7AH4pzUtDilzFxRp60DDMYG6Hmkfo8k" -H "Origin: https://gamma.libreopcion.com" -H "Connection: keep-alive" -H "Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty" -H "Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors" -H "Sec-Fetch-Site: same-site" -H "Priority: u=0"
```

[attachment]
[attachment]


- Al filtrar por `orderStatus=listo_para_retirar`aparecen resultados combinados para enviar y retirar.



```
curl "https://gamma.api4.libreopcion.com/v4/purchases?rol=vendedor&page=1&limit=10&orderStatus=listo_para_retirar" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:137.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/137.0" -H "Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*" -H "Accept-Language: es-MX" -H "Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br, zstd" -H "Referer: https://gamma.libreopcion.com/venta/mis-ventas?page=1&limit=10&orderStatus=listo_para_retirar" -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..IRwANDGX0tns7AH4pzUtDilzFxRp60DDMYG6Hmkfo8k" -H "Origin: https://gamma.libreopcion.com" -H "Connection: keep-alive" -H "Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty" -H "Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors" -H "Sec-Fetch-Site: same-site" -H "Priority: u=0"
```

[attachment]


- Al filtrar por `orderStatus=listo_para_enviar` aparecen resultados combinados para enviar y retirar, adicional a eso no aparecen todos los listos para enviar, aparecen dos para retirar.



```
curl "https://gamma.api4.libreopcion.com/v4/purchases?rol=vendedor&page=1&limit=10&orderStatus=listo_para_enviar" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:137.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/137.0" -H "Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*" -H "Accept-Language: es-MX" -H "Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br, zstd" -H "Referer: https://gamma.libreopcion.com/venta/mis-ventas?page=1&limit=10&orderStatus=listo_para_enviar" -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..IRwANDGX0tns7AH4pzUtDilzFxRp60DDMYG6Hmkfo8k" -H "Origin: https://gamma.libreopcion.com" -H "Connection: keep-alive" -H "Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty" -H "Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors" -H "Sec-Fetch-Site: same-site" -H "Priority: u=0"
```

[attachment]
[attachment]


- Por alguna razón cuando filtro por `orderStatus=entregado`no recibo una respuesta.



```
curl "https://gamma.api4.libreopcion.com/v4/purchases?rol=vendedor&page=1&limit=10&orderStatus=entregado" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:137.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/137.0" -H "Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*" -H "Accept-Language: es-MX" -H "Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br, zstd" -H "Referer: https://gamma.libreopcion.com/venta/mis-ventas?page=1&limit=10&orderStatus=entregado" -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..IRwANDGX0tns7AH4pzUtDilzFxRp60DDMYG6Hmkfo8k" -H "Origin: https://gamma.libreopcion.com" -H "Connection: keep-alive" -H "Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty" -H "Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors" -H "Sec-Fetch-Site: same-site" -H "Priority: u=0"
```

[attachment]
- Error al filtrar por `orderStatus=pedido_cancelado`



```
curl "https://gamma.api4.libreopcion.com/v4/purchases?rol=vendedor&page=1&limit=10&busqueda=&orderStatus=pedido_cancelado" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:137.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/137.0" -H "Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*" -H "Accept-Language: es-MX" -H "Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br, zstd" -H "Referer: https://gamma.libreopcion.com/venta/mis-ventas?page=1&limit=10&busqueda=&orderStatus=pedido_cancelado" -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..IRwANDGX0tns7AH4pzUtDilzFxRp60DDMYG6Hmkfo8k" -H "Origin: https://gamma.libreopcion.com" -H "Connection: keep-alive" -H "Sec-Fetch-Dest: empty" -H "Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors" -H "Sec-Fetch-Site: same-site" -H "Priority: u=0"
```

[attachment]




Verificar el correcto funcionamiento de todos los demás filtros
